About Us

Our Story & Mission

Dedicated to empowering communities worldwide

Get Closer With Us

Dedicated to Providing Assistance Where There Is None

Watered Garden Foundation is dedicated to providing assistance where there is none. We are often asked: "Who is Watered Garden Foundation?" and "Why do you do what you do?"

The answer is simple: we believe every human being deserves dignity, opportunity, and hope — regardless of where they were born or the circumstances they face.

Get In Touch
Our Mission

Three Pillars of Our Work

Help Each Other

Building bridges between those who have and those who need — creating a sustainable cycle of compassion and generosity.

Provide Better Education

We fund scholarships, school supplies, and mentorship to help students pursue higher studies and build brighter futures.

Give Happiness to Others

From food drives to community events, we bring moments of joy, relief, and dignity to families across the world.

Our Story

The Beginning of Everything

Watered Garden Foundation is a funding and non-profit charity organization deeply involved in helping poor and needy people all over the world — making a positive difference in their lives.

We started with this sole purpose as a charity foundation, striving to create positive change in education, health care, disaster response, and the daily lives of the poor and needy.

Watered Garden Foundation supports students to pursue higher studies and focuses on health and nutrition through targeted project support.

Join Our Mission

Let's Make a Change — Become a Volunteer

Be part of the movement. Your contribution — time, skill, or generosity — makes a world of difference.

Join With Us

Watered Garden Foundation

A non-profit organization engaged in the humanitarian sector — empowering communities and lending helping hands across the world.
